name: Project CRUD
summary: Project create, list, and delete operations with native folder picker and git initialization. Projects are persisted in SQLite and displayed in card/list views with search.
goals: Create new projects with path, name, and description
List projects in card or list view with search filtering
Provide native OS folder selection dialog

acceptanceCriteria.when: user clicks 'Create Project' and selects a folder
acceptanceCriteria.then: a new project is created with the selected path
the project list filters to matching results
the project is removed from the database and the list updates

unit-test.given: A project with an invalid path
unit-test.when: user tries to create the project

end-to-end.when: user creates, lists, and deletes a project
end-to-end.then: all operations succeed and the UI reflects changes

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
